programmes.show_description: Adventure with Jonathan Rhys Meyers. The tale of James Brooke, the Rajah of Sarawak, who inspired the Rudyard Kipling story The Man Who Would Be King and Joseph Conrad's novel Lord Jim. (2021)
Violent crime thriller with Nicolas Cage. When his brother falls foul of a ruthless mobster, a straight-laced man must go against the odds to save him with the help of an old friend. (2017)
London TV returns soon.
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. Trivette's brother Simon is arrested by the Rangers, and finds out Simon has been told to kill him. S6, Ep18
A hearing-impaired 14-year-old gang member is conned into taking the rap for a murder committed by a big-time drug dealer. S2, Ep9
After narrowly escaping with his life, Steve must infiltrate a huge terrorist complex to search for the stolen missiles. S1, Ep4
Twisty thrills with Kari Wuhrer. An amateur storm chaser and a meteorologist discover strange tornadoes across the world are a cover for an alien invasion. (2012)

Scorching British sci-fi with Christopher Lee. A freak heatwave hits the island of Fara and leaves the locals incapacitated, leading a visiting scientist to suspect that aliens are to blame. (1967)

Crime drama based on true events, with Peter Falk. When a crook learns a supposedly impenetrable security firm is anything but secure, he rounds up a gang for a multi-million dollar heist. (1978)
A rescue party goes to save some scientists on a dying planet, but they are all dead when the team arrives. Can McCoy save the day? S1, Ep5/30
An international syndicate kidnaps the President's advisor who is en route to meet with the Chinese, and demands one billion in gold bullion in exchange. S1, Ep5
Romano and Hooker try to avert a war between independent hauliers and a wholesaler who has been sabotaging their trucks. S2, Ep10
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. When the death of a friend's son is ruled an accident, CD investigates further. S6, Ep19
Western with Gregory Peck. An ageing bank robber goes in search of his former partner, who double-crossed him - but finds himself forced to take care of a little girl. (1971)
Thriller with Samuel L Jackson. A trained black-ops interrogator and an FBI agent resort to extreme measures to coerce a terrorist to disclose the location of three nuclear devices. (2010)
Crime comedy with Sean Connery. Reformed crook Vito has turned over a new leaf, but is forced to abandon the straight and narrow to take part in a robbery planned by his father and his son. (1989)
Action thriller with Dolph Lundgren. When a Grand Jury witness is murdered, former government agent Jason Price finds himself caught in a frightening spiral where no one can be trusted. (2001)

Drama based on Christopher Marlowe's play, with Richard Burton. An ageing scholar strikes an unholy bargain with the Devil: youth, wisdom and the woman of his dreams, in exchange for his soul. (1967)
Period comedy thriller with Diana Rigg. A journalist sets out to track down a society of hired killers, but is taken aback by the smooth sophistication of the organisation's leader. (1969)
While beaming up from Alpha 177, a transporter accident splits Captain Kirk into two beings: one good and one evil. S1, Ep6/30
The President authorises payment of the ransom for Henry, but when the gold is stolen, Steve must recover the bullion and - more importantly - rescue Henry. S1, Ep6

Action comedy with Woody Harrelson. Two New York cops plan to rob a train carrying all the day's takings from the city's subway network, but a pyromaniac serial killer threatens their plans. (1995)
Action thriller sequel with Sylvester Stallone. When a member of his team goes missing, Ray Breslin is forced to return to the seemingly impenetrable prison he once escaped from. (2018)
